imgCredit: Hagar And Ishmael In A Distant Rocky Landscape - Francis Gold
name: The monastery below a mountain
description:
The ancient monastery proved a disappointing set of ruins to explore. With no traps or a hint of lingering magic in the place, %PERSON_NAME should have known the %MULTI[Blackened Scepter|Book Pyroluminous|Crown of Horns|Unwanted Room|Gift from the Pit|Evergoing Wheel|Door to the Dreamlands|First Shadow Behind|fabled Silver Key|'book without a writer'|Mask of the Red Death]%MULTI wouldn't be found here. %He's ready to leave when %he suddenly feels an odd draft. One of the brickwalls is breathing.

It's suffered from moisture eroding it over the centuries. Water will carve a path through even the mountains given enough time. A few swings of the hammer folds the weakened wall and reveals a winding cave behind it, leading deep into the mountain behind the monastery...
